# Kalfa RSVP + Seating SaaS

> Multi-tenant event management platform with guest invitations, seating assignments, and payment processing.

## Overview

Kalfa is an RSVP and seating management SaaS built for event organizers in Israel. It provides multi-tenant organizations, event creation, guest management, table/seating layouts, invitation workflows (SMS, WhatsApp, voice calls), and payment processing via SUMIT gateway.

- **Primary language**: Hebrew (RTL)
- **Stack**: Laravel 12, Livewire 4, Tailwind CSS v4, PostgreSQL
- **Auth**: Laravel Sanctum (API tokens), WebAuthn (passkeys)
- **Payments**: SUMIT gateway (OfficeGuy) — redirect and token flows

## API

Base URL: `https://kalfa.me/api`

Authentication: Bearer token via Laravel Sanctum.
All tenant endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {token}` header.
Resources are scoped by organization.

### Public Endpoints (no auth)

- `GET /api/rsvp/{slug}` — Get event RSVP page by invitation slug
- `POST /api/rsvp/{slug}/responses` — Submit RSVP response (attending/declining/maybe)

### Authenticated Endpoints

#### Organizations
- `GET /api/organizations/{organization}` — Get organization details
- `PATCH /api/organizations/{organization}` — Update organization

#### Events
- `GET /api/organizations/{organization}/events` — List events
- `POST /api/organizations/{organization}/events` — Create event
- `GET /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}` — Get event
- `PATCH /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}` — Update event
- `DELETE /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}` — Delete event

#### Guests
- `GET /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/guests` — List guests
- `POST /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/guests` — Add guest
- `POST /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/guests/import` — Bulk import guests
- `GET /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/guests/{guest}` — Get guest
- `PUT /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/guests/{guest}` — Update guest
- `DELETE /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/guests/{guest}` — Delete guest

#### Tables & Seating
- `GET /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/event-tables` — List tables
- `POST /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/event-tables` — Create table
- `PUT /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/event-tables/{eventTable}` — Update table
- `DELETE /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/event-tables/{eventTable}` — Delete table
- `GET /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/seat-assignments` — Get seat map
- `PUT /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/seat-assignments` — Update seat assignments

#### Invitations
- `GET /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/invitations` — List invitations
- `POST /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/invitations` — Create invitation
- `POST /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/invitations/{invitation}/send` — Send invitation

#### Payments & Checkout
- `POST /api/organizations/{organization}/events/{event}/checkout` — Initiate payment
- `GET /api/payments/{payment}` — Check payment status
- `POST /api/billing/checkout` — Billing checkout
- `POST /api/billing/coupon/validate` — Validate coupon code

### Webhooks
- `POST /api/webhooks/{gateway}` — Payment gateway webhook (HMAC-verified)

## RSVP Response Types

- `attending` — Guest will attend
- `declining` — Guest will not attend
- `maybe` — Guest is undecided

## Event Statuses

- `draft` — Event created, not yet paid
- `pending_payment` — Checkout initiated, awaiting payment
- `active` — Payment confirmed, event is live
- `cancelled` — Event cancelled
- `completed` — Event has concluded

## Rate Limits

- RSVP show: throttled per slug
- RSVP submit: throttled per slug
- Mobile auth login: throttled
- Webhooks: throttled

## Contact

- Website: https://kalfa.me
- Support: Available through the platform
